\tzpentry{ID3645}{Grav Charge Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3645 introduces Grav Charge Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{Q}_{\text{grav}}^{\text{total}} = \sum_{\alpha \in \{\text{photon}, \text{phonon}, \text{spin}, \text{hybrid}\}} \hat{Q}_{\text{grav}}^{(\alpha)} \end{equation}
